camps.title: Summer aquabelle camps 2026
camps.subtitle: Become an aquabelle!
camps.description: Summer, water, music and smiles. We invite all girls to experience unforgettable summer camps – a mix of movement, elegance, team energy and the joy of water. The camps are suitable for beginners and advanced aquabelles alike.
includes: Training in the water and on dry land
Practising figures and choreography to music
